case_title: ZHANG, ZHEN CHUAN vs. TRANSLAND CONSTRUCTION,INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, ZHEN CHUAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSLAND CONSTRUCTION,INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ZHANG, ZHEN CHUAN
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSLAND CONSTRUCTION,INC.
NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $192.21 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSLAND CONSTRUCTION,INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, ZHEN CHUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANSLAND CONSTRUCTION,INC. $5,371.60 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,451.60
